rows.source_ref: "Conversation with Market Master: Larry Williams", interview hosted by dr Darius Swierk (excerpt from the ebook "Conversations with Forex Market Masters"), ForexFactory thread 1255877, forexfactory.com, https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/1255877/conversation-with-market-master-larry-williams
rows.concept: Biographical/mindset interview about Larry Williams' 60-year trading career and psychology, with no mechanical rules disclosed.
rows.eligibility_reason: No usable edge: an inspirational career/psychology interview promoting an ebook; no entry/exit rules, parameters, or tradeable system stated.
rows.notes: Name-drops indicators he created (Williams %R, Ultimate Oscillator, COT indices, accumulation/distribution) and mentions he runs mechanical systems on crude oil, e-mini S&P, gold and bonds, but discloses zero rule logic. Explicitly disparages Forex trading. Marketing funnel to www.ForexMarketMasters.com/ebook. Nothing implementable.

notes: Single-post ForexFactory thread; interview transcript only, no mechanical strategy to harvest.
